subject: An enormous moss-covered giant emerging from a vast woven beanstalk that twists upward into the sky, its body fused with vines, leaves, and tangled greenery
description: A colossal humanoid giant rises from a massive braided beanstalk, its torso and head appearing to bloom out of the vegetation. The figure is encrusted with moss, leaves, and bark-like skin, with vines wrapping around its arms and shoulders. The beanstalk itself dominates the lower half of the composition, woven from countless thick green stems spiraling skyward. Below and around the stalk, broad green leaves and ferns sprawl across a cliffside. The background opens into a soft cloudy sky with diffused daylight. The palette is dominated by saturated greens and earthy browns, with pale blue-grey sky tones giving the giant a sublime, towering silhouette.
foreground: Giant fused with a massive twisting beanstalk, surrounded by broad leaves and vines
background: Open pale sky with soft clouds and distant haze
